Payments.Transaction Failed: Please ensure your card has sufficient funds or try another payment method. If money was deducted, it will be refunded within 3-5 business days.
Payments.Billing Query: You can view your invoice history from the Billing Dashboard.
Payments.Refund Delay: Refunds typically take 5-7 business days. If it has been longer, please share your transaction ID and we will expedite the process.
Payments.Duplicate Charge: We apologize for the duplicate charge. Our billing team has been notified and will process a reversal within 24-48 hours.

HackerRank.Login Issue: Please try resetting your password using the 'Forgot Password' link.
HackerRank.Account Locked: Your account has been temporarily locked for security. Please wait 30 minutes or contact support to unlock it immediately.
HackerRank.Password Reset Issue: Please check your spam/junk folder for the password reset email. If not found, try requesting a new reset link.

AI Tools.API Downtime: We are aware of degraded performance and are investigating. Please check our status page.
AI Tools.Application Crash: We have logged this crash report. Please try clearing your cache and restarting the application. If the issue persists, our engineering team will investigate.
AI Tools.Server Error: Our servers are experiencing issues. Our infrastructure team is working on a fix. Please check our status page for live updates.

Security.Account Compromise: [CRITICAL] Your account has been flagged for immediate review. We recommend changing your password immediately and enabling two-factor authentication (2FA).
Security.Suspicious Activity: We have detected unusual activity on your account. As a precaution, please verify your recent login history and update your password.
Security.Phishing Report: Thank you for reporting this. Our security team will investigate the phishing attempt. Please do not click on any suspicious links.
Security.Security Concern: Your security concern has been escalated to our cybersecurity team. We recommend enabling 2FA and reviewing your account permissions.

Performance.Database Slowdown: Our database team is investigating the performance degradation. We are scaling resources to improve query response times.
Performance.Page Load Delay: We are aware of slow page loads and are optimizing our content delivery. Please try clearing your browser cache in the meantime.
Performance.General Slowdown: We are monitoring system performance and working to resolve the slowdown. Thank you for your patience.

General.Unknown Issue: Thank you for reaching out. A support representative will review your request shortly.
